text:
CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable has been retired; therefore, the field is blank after 2023. The Inflation Reduction Act of 
2022 expanded the eligibility for Part D low-income subsidies (LIS) in 2024. All beneficiaries who 
qualify for LIS receive the full (100%) subsidy. Partial subsidies have been discontinued; therefore, this 
variable is no longer populated. 

The CCW constructs the plan characteristics file from information submitted by plan sponsors to 
CMS’s Health
